# Bayesian Bracket Results

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(knitr)

sort_matchup_table <- function(data_frame) {
	round_levels <- c(
		"First Four",
		"Round of 64",
		"Round of 32",
		"Round of 16",
		"Elite 8",
		"Final Four",
		"Championship"
	)

	if (!all(c("round", "matchup_number") %in% names(data_frame))) {
		return(data_frame)
	}

	data_frame[order(factor(data_frame$round, levels = round_levels), data_frame$matchup_number), , drop = FALSE]
}
```

## East Region Matchups

```{r}
res_east1 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'East_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 1))
kable(res_east1)

res_east2 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'East_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 2))
kable(res_east2)

res_east3 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'East_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 3))
kable(res_east3)

res_east4 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'East_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 4))
kable(res_east4)
```

## Midwest Region Matchups

```{r}
res_midwest1 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Midwest_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 1))
kable(res_midwest1)

res_midwest2 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Midwest_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 2))
kable(res_midwest2)

res_midwest3 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Midwest_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 3))
kable(res_midwest3)

res_midwest4 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Midwest_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 4))
kable(res_midwest4)
```

## South Region Matchups

```{r}
res_south1 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'South_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 1))
kable(res_south1)

res_south2 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'South_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 2))
kable(res_south2)

res_south3 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'South_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 3))
kable(res_south3)

res_south4 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'South_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 4))
kable(res_south4)
```

## West Region Matchups

```{r}
res_west1 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'West_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 1))
kable(res_west1)

res_west2 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'West_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 2))
kable(res_west2)

res_west3 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'West_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 3))
kable(res_west3)

res_west4 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'West_Region.xlsx'), sheet = 4))
kable(res_west4)
```

## Final Four and Championship

```{r}
res_final_four1 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Final_Four_and_Championship.xlsx'), sheet = 1))
kable(res_final_four1)

res_final_four2 <- sort_matchup_table(read_xlsx(file.path('bracket_results', 'Final_Four_and_Championship.xlsx'), sheet = 2))
kable(res_final_four2)
```
